home.h1: 15 Years in Taiwan. We Only Take Cases We Can See Through.
home.sub: Boutique executive search for mid-to-senior roles in Taiwan and cross-border US–Taiwan hiring. Every search is handled personally, start to finish.
home.services_sub: Three services, one commitment: the consultant handles every search personally.
home.jobs_empty: No public openings at the moment — reach out directly
home.cta_sub: Whether you need key talent or you're exploring your next move, let's talk.

services.local_sub: Finding mid-to-senior executives for companies based in Taiwan.
services.crossborder_sub: Helping US companies hire Taiwan-based talent — bridging compensation and culture gaps.
services.jobseeker_sub: Confidential service for senior executives — your profile is seen only by the consultant.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.sub: Whether you're an HR leader, C-suite executive, or a senior professional exploring your next move — we'd love to hear from you.
contact.resume_sub: Your data is seen only by the consultant
contact.privacy_notice: Your résumé is stored with encryption and accessed only by the consultant. It is never shared or sold. You may request deletion at any time.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.consent: I understand and agree that my personal data will be stored confidentially and used solely for job matching purposes. I may request deletion at any time.
contact.success_hire: Request received. We'll be in touch within 1 business day.
contact.success_resume: Profile received. The consultant will reach out within 2 business days.

jobs.title: Active Searches
jobs.sub: Every opening is personally vetted by the consultant before it's listed.
jobs.empty_body: Active searches aren't always public. Senior executives are welcome to submit their profile — we'll reach out when the right opportunity arises.
jobs.handled_by: This search is handled personally by the consultant
jobs.privacy: Your résumé is seen only by the consultant and is never shared externally.

footer.tagline: Boutique executive search in Taiwan for over 15 years — local searches and US–Taiwan cross-border hiring.

footer.appeal: This company operates legally under the Employment Service Act. For job-related disputes or complaints, please contact the Ministry of Labor or your local competent authority.
